docs.name: Dot Grid Background
docs.description: Interactive dot-grid pattern with a glowing cursor-following effect.

props.name: children
props.description: Components mapped into the z-index layer visually above the matrix.

props.name: dotColor
props.description: Color code controlling the default un-illuminated grid representation.

props.name: dotSize
props.description: Diameter specifying visual footprint density of single grid intersections.

props.name: gap
props.description: Vector translation pixel count separating independent grid items.

props.name: hoverRadius
props.description: Spread area around the cursor triggering focus interactions.

props.name: hoverScale
props.description: Float magnitude expanding intersections actively caught inside the hover bounds.

docs.overview: DotGridBackground renders a canvas-based animated dot grid that reacts to mouse movement with ripple propagation. Dots scale and shift colour as the cursor passes, creating an interactive depth effect behind any wrapped content.

scenarios.title: Interactive hero section
scenarios.description: Wrap a hero headline in DotGridBackground to create an eye-catching, cursor-reactive landing section.

scenarios.title: Bento grid cell background
scenarios.description: Use as a decorative background inside individual bento grid cells for subtle interactivity.

scenarios.title: Full-page app background
scenarios.description: Render at viewport height as a fixed or full-page background layer behind your main layout.
